calendar.matters:
Motion For Aportionment Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-04-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiff's motion to distribute settlement funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Michelle Edwards, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs.
Dana Ames & Victoria Brooks, heirs to the Estate of Josephine Ghens, were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Stefanie Mickelson & Craig S. Rapp, heirs to the Estate of Loreta Dautzenberg Frank, were present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.

After hearing hearing testimony from the heir and argument by counsel, and good cause appearing, the Court Ordered that distribution of all net settlement funds from November 17, 2003 to the present, from the underlying survival, loss of consortium and wrongful death action, shall be distributed in the following proportions:

Estate of Josephine Ghens as Successor-in-Interest to the Estate of Jack Ghens, and individually for Loss of Consortium and as Wrongful Death Heir - 20%

Estate of Loretta Dautzenberg Frank, Wrongful Death - 80%

The Wartnick Law Firm shall receive $834.00 as reasonble attorneys' fees and costs incurred in this proceedings.

Any and all future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set for the above.

The signature of Stefanie Mickelson shall be sufficient on all settlement documents.

Order Granting the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
TRIAL
